original_premise: Does the act of writing a prompt for an AI code-review assistant — prior to seeing any AI output — shift a developer's confidence in their review verdict, independently of the AI output itself?

sharpened_alternatives.one_sentence: Does the act of writing a prompt for an AI code-review assistant — prior to seeing any AI output — shift a developer's confidence in their review verdict, independently of the AI output itself?
